metadata.title: Synaply - Mụta Okwu site na AI & Nkwughachi Achịkọrọ
metadata.description: Mee ka nkà asụsụ gị ka mma site na nkwughachi achịkọrọ nke AI na-akwado. Mepụta ndepụta okwu nke gị ma ọ bụ mụta ihe site na ndepụta ọha nke ndị ọzọ kerịtara.
metadata.keywords: mụta Bekee, nkwughachi achịkọrọ, onye na-ewu okwu, flashcards, mmụta asụsụ AI, ndepụta okwu, ngwa mmụta asụsụ, mụta Spanish, mụta French, mụta German, amamihe asụsụ, iburu okwu n'isi, mmụta SRS
metadata.og_title: Synaply - Mmụta Okwu Ndị Mara Mma
metadata.og_description: Mee ka nkà asụsụ gị ka mma site na nkwughachi achịkọrọ nke AI na-akwado. Mụta ngwa ngwa, cheta ogologo oge.
metadata.og_image_alt: Interface ngwa mmụta asụsụ Synaply AI
metadata.twitter_title: Synaply - Mụta Okwu Ọhụrụ n'Ezigbo Mgbalị
metadata.twitter_description: Soro Synaply ka ị gbasaa okwu gị site na iji nkwughachi achịkọrọ mara mma na AI.

common.title: Isiokwu
common.footer_help_text: Help us improve! Share your ideas, report bugs, or request features:

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Ịmụ {target} site na {source}
dashboard.community_lists_desc: Chọpụta ndepụta okwu ọha na playlists sitere n'aka ndị ọrụ ndị ọzọ.
dashboard.ai_practice_desc: Mee ka okwu gị ka mma site n'ịsụgharị ahịrịokwu AI mepụtara dabere na isiokwu ọ bụla ma ọ bụ ndepụta okwu gị.
dashboard.manage_words_desc: Lee, chọọ, dezie ma ọ bụ hichapụ okwu na mkpokọta gị.
dashboard.import_error_retry: Anyị enweghị ike ichekwa okwu ọhụrụ gị. Ka anyị gbalịa ọzọ!
dashboard.generate_word_list_error: Mepụta ndepụta okwu adaghị nke ọma.
dashboard.select_topic_error: Biko họrọ isiokwu ma ọ bụ tinye onwe gị context.
dashboard.translation_placeholder: Ntụgharị (ma ọ bụ jiri ntụgharị akpaaka)
dashboard.ai_translation_notice: AI ga-enyere aka na nkọwa na ahịrịokwu nlereanya
dashboard.usage_example: Ihe atụ eji eme ihe ma ọ bụ ndetu
dashboard.delete_confirm: Ị doro anya na ị chọrọ ihichapụ okwu a?
dashboard.delete_all_confirm: Ị doro anya na ị chọrọ ihichapụ okwu gị NIILLE? Enweghị ike ịlaghachi azụ n'ihe a.
dashboard.no_words_found: Ahụghị okwu ọ bụla. Gbalịa okwu ọchụchọ ọzọ ma ọ bụ tinye ụfọdụ okwu!
dashboard.no_words_for_lesson: Ahụghị okwu ọ bụla ị ga-amụ. Biko tinye okwu ọhụrụ na ndepụta gị n'ebu ụzọ!
dashboard.no_words_to_review: Ị nweghị okwu ị ga-atụle taa. Laghachi ma emechaa ma ọ bụ tinye okwu ọhụrụ!
dashboard.lesson_complete_desc: Ezigbo ọrụ! Ị tụleela okwu gị maka taa.
dashboard.practice_setup_desc: Tinye isiokwu iji mepụta ahịrịokwu omume ahaziri maka gị naanị!
dashboard.practice_topic_hint: Ịhapụ ya tọgbọrọ n'efu ga-emepụta ahịrịokwu dabere na okwu gị.
dashboard.footer_help_text: Nyere anyị aka ime ka ọ dị mma! Kesaa echiche gị, kọọ njehie, ma ọ bụ rịọ atụmatụ:
dashboard.support_desc: Ọ bụrụ na ngwa a amasị gị, ị nwere ike ịkwado mmepe ya.

onboarding.journey_begins: Njem gị gaa na amamihe asụsụ na-amalite ebe a.
onboarding.strategy_desc: Iji nweta ihe kachasị mma na Synaply, anyị na-akwado atụmatụ dị mfe a:
onboarding.step1_desc: Tinye ihe dị ka okwu 100 metụtara otu isiokwu (dịka, Azụmahịa ma ọ bụ Njem) iji wuo ntọala siri ike.
onboarding.step2_desc: Muta okwu ndị a site na nkwughachi kwa ụbọchị ruo mgbe ha ghọrọ akụkụ nke okwu gị.
onboarding.step3_desc: Gbanwee gaa na Omume AI iji jiri okwu ọhụrụ gị mee ihe n'ahịrịokwu zuru ezu na ọnọdụ ụwa n'ezie.

dashboard.generate_ai_title: Mepụta Ndepụta Okwu site na AI
dashboard.custom_topic_label: Isiokwu nke gị ma ọ bụ context (nhọrọ)
dashboard.custom_topic_placeholder: dịka Okwu maka nzukọ azụmahịa gbasara marketing
dashboard.publish_desc: Kesaa mkpokọta okwu {count} a n'aka ndị ọrụ ndị ọzọ. Ọ ga-apụta na gallery Ndepụta Ọha.
dashboard.publish_error: Ikesa ndepụta okwu adaghị nke ọma.
dashboard.inline_add_error: Biko nye ma okwu mbụ na ntụgharị ya
dashboard.save_batch_success: Echekwaala okwu {count} nke ọma na ndepụta gị!
dashboard.save_batch_error: Ịchekwa okwu adaghị nke ọma. Biko gbalịa ọzọ.
dashboard.remove_duplicates_error: Biko wepụ okwu ndị yiri onwe ha tupu ị chekwaa.
dashboard.remove_duplicates_publish_error: Biko wepụ okwu ndị yiri onwe ha tupu i kesaa.

ai_word_info.error_coffee_break: AI na-ezu ike ntakịrị. Biko gbalịa ọzọ n'obere oge!
ai_word_info.error_generic: Oops! Anyị enweghị ike nweta AI insights. Ka anyị gbalịa ọzọ!

public_lists.search_placeholder: Chọọ ndepụta site na isiokwu ma ọ bụ nkọwa...
public_lists.no_lists_desc: Gbalịa ọchụchọ ọzọ ma ọ bụ gbanwee nzacha asụsụ gị.
public_lists.load_error: Anyị enweghị ike ịdọta ndepụta ọha ugbu a.

detail.added_error: Itinye okwu na mkpokọta gị adaghị nke ọma.

profile.terms_welcome: Nnọọ na Synaply. Site n'iji ọrụ anyị, ị kwetara na usoro ndị a...
profile.title: Nhazi Profaịlụ
profile.leave_empty: Hapụ ya tọgbọrọ n'efu ka ị dowe password dị ugbu a
profile.subtitle: Jikwaa ozi onwe gị na nhazi asụsụ
profile.terms_beta_warning: Important Beta Notice: Synaply is currently in its beta testing phase. By using this service, you acknowledge that you are participating in a testing period and understand the risks associated with pre-release software.
profile.terms_intro_text: By accessing or using Synaply, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this site.
profile.terms_beta_text: Synaply is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis for beta testing purposes. You explicitly acknowledge and agree that: (a) The service may contain bugs, errors, and experience frequent interruptions. (b) We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the service at any time without notice. (c) CRITICAL: During the beta period, we may perform database resets or deletions. This means all your data, including progress, word lists, and account information, may be permanently deleted without prior warning. You are responsible for maintaining your own backups of any important data.
profile.terms_accounts_text: To use certain features, you must register for an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
profile.terms_content_text: Our service allows you to post, link, store, share and otherwise make available certain information, text, graphics, or other material. You are responsible for the content you post. Synaply retains all rights to its original content, features, and functionality, which are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.
profile.terms_conduct_text: You agree not to use the service for any unlawful purpose or to solicit others to perform or participate in any unlawful acts. You shall not attempt to interfere with the proper working of the service, including through viruses, denial of service attacks, or any other harmful technology.
profile.terms_liability_text: In no event shall Synaply, nor its directors, employees, partners, or agents, be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages, including without limitation, loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses, resulting from your access to or use of or inability to access or use the service.
profile.terms_changes_text: We reserve the right, at our sole discretion, to modify or replace these Terms at any time. We will try to provide at least 30 days' notice prior to any new terms taking effect for significant changes. What constitutes a material change will be determined at our sole discretion.
profile.terms_contact_text: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us through the support channels provided on the website.

register.title: Mepụta account gị
register.password_hint: Gha agharịrị ịdịkarịa ala mkpụrụ akwụkwọ 8

best_practice.title: Omume Kachasị Mma maka Ọganihu
best_practice.strategy_desc: Maka mmụta kachasị mma, anyị na-akwado atụmatụ dị mfe nke nwere usoro 3:
best_practice.step1_desc: Tinye ihe dị ka okwu 100 na-eleba anya n'otu isiokwu (dịka, Njem ma ọ bụ Azụmahịa) iji mepụta context.
best_practice.step2_desc: Muta okwu ndị a site na nkwughachi kwa ụbọchị ruo mgbe ha ghọrọ akụkụ nke okwu gị.
best_practice.step3_desc: Gbanwee gaa na Omume AI iji jiri okwu ọhụrụ gị mee ihe n'ahịrịokwu zuru ezu na ọnọdụ ụwa n'ezie.

getting_started.title: Ịmalite
getting_started.desc: Synaply bụ ngwa ọrụ siri ike emere iji nyere gị aka ịgbasa okwu gị na ime ka nkà asụsụ gị ka mma site na iji nkwughachi achịkọrọ na AI.
getting_started.step1_desc: Tinye okwu n'onwe gị ma ọ bụ jiri AI mepụta ndepụta site na isiokwu na ọkwa.
getting_started.step2_desc: Jiri Vocabulary Review wee buru okwu n'isi site n'iji FSRS algorithm.

manual.title: Ịtinye n'Onwe Gị
manual.desc: Tinye okwu n'asụsụ ị na-amụ na ntụgharị ya. Ị nwere ike ịgbakwunye okwu ma ọ bụ context maka iburu ya n'isi nke ọma.

auto_translate.title: Ntụgharị Akpaaka
auto_translate.desc: Jiri atụmatụ "Ntụgharị Akpaaka" maka ntụgharị ozugbo site na ọrụ DeepL.

ai_list.title: Mmepụta Ndepụta (AI Word List)
ai_list.desc: Họrọ ọkwa (A1-C2) na isiokwu, AI (Gemini) ga-achịkọta ndepụta okwu ndị dị mkpa maka gị, nke enwere ike itinye na dictionary gị na otu click.

ai_insights.title: AI Insights
ai_insights.desc: Maka okwu ọ bụla, AI nwere ike inye synonyms, ihe atụ eji eme ihe, na ndụmọdụ grammatical.

spaced_repetition.title: Nkwughachi Achịkọrọ
spaced_repetition.desc: Synaply na-eji FSRS (Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler) algorithm gbakọọ oge kachasị mma iji kwughachi okwu ọ bụla.
spaced_repetition.step1: A na-egosi gị okwu n'asụsụ mbụ.
spaced_repetition.step2: Tinye ntụgharị ya ma pịa Enter ma ọ bụ Lelee Azịza.
spaced_repetition.step3: Ọ bụrụ na ichetaghị — pịa "Echetara m" iji hụ azịza ya.
spaced_repetition.step4: Algorithm ga-atụgharị oge ntụle ọzọ dabere na nzaghachi gị.

ai_practice.title: Omume AI: Ntụgharị Ahịrịokwu
ai_practice.desc: Atụmatụ a na-enyere aka ịzụ grammar na context site n'ịsụgharị ahịrịokwu zuru ezu nke AI deere gị kpọmkwem.
ai_practice.step1: Họrọ isiokwu (dịka, "Azụmahịa", "Njem") ma ọ bụ hapụ oghere ahụ tọgbọrọ n'efu.
ai_practice.step2: AI ga-emepụta ahịrịokwu 5 na isiokwu ahọpụtara.
ai_practice.step3: Nyefee ntụgharị gị ma nweta nkọwa zuru ezu.
ai_practice.step4: AI ga-arụ aka na njehie ma tụọ aro ntụgharị kachasị mma yana nkọwa.

dictionary_management.title: Njikwa Dictionary
dictionary_management.search: Chọọ: Jiri oghere ọchụchọ chọta okwu na mkpokọta gị ngwa ngwa.
dictionary_management.sorting: Ịhazi: Lee ndepụta okwu gị niile nwere nhọrọ ihichapụ ha.
dictionary_management.delete_all: Hichapụ okwu niile: Ikike ikpochapụ dictionary gị kpamkpam na otu click.

progress.title: Ọganihu na Akara
progress.desc: Akara gị (n'isi ngwa ahụ) na-egosi ọnụ ọgụgụ okwu atụgharịrị nke ọma. Ka akara ahụ na-adị elu, ka okwu ndị ị mụtara nke ọma na-adịkwu elu!

not_authorized_admin: You do not have administrator permissions to view this page.
